description: A static, responsive webpage showcasing traditional snacks from Wuhan, built with pure HTML and CSS.
author: Static Web Developer

files.purpose: Main HTML document containing the semantic structure and content of the webpage.
files.validation: HTML5 validation passed. Uses semantic tags (<header>, <nav>, <main>, <section>, <article>, <footer>).

files.purpose: Stylesheet defining the visual design, layout, and responsive behavior for all screen sizes.
files.validation: CSS3 validation passed. Implements Flexbox/Grid for layout and media queries for responsiveness.

files.purpose: Representative image for the 'Hot Dry Noodles (热干面)' snack item.
files.validation: Placeholder image included. Alt text provided for accessibility.

files.purpose: Representative image for the 'Doupi (豆皮)' snack item.
files.validation: Placeholder image included. Alt text provided for accessibility.

files.purpose: Representative image for the 'Mianwo (面窝)' snack item.
files.validation: Placeholder image included. Alt text provided for accessibility.

files.purpose: Representative image for the 'Tangbao (汤包)' snack item.
files.validation: Placeholder image included. Alt text provided for accessibility.

files.purpose: Representative image for the 'Fried Tofu (炸豆腐)' snack item.
files.validation: Placeholder image included. Alt text provided for accessibility.

removed_artifacts.note: All backend (FastAPI) and frontend framework (Next.js) files have been removed to comply with the 'static files only' constraint.

success_criteria_met: Features 5 distinct Wuhan snack items with images and descriptions.
Contains no backend logic, JavaScript frameworks, or external dependencies.
run_instructions: Open 'index.html' directly in any modern web browser to view the webpage.
